# Code Native

Code Native is a premium educational platform providing high-quality coding tutorials in Telugu. We specialize in making complex programming concepts accessible to native Telugu speakers through interactive lessons and a built-in compiler.

## Core Tutorials
- C Programming: Fundamentals and advanced concepts.
- Java: Object-oriented programming and application development.
- Python: Modern scripting, automation, and logic building.
- Web Development: HTML, CSS, and interactive JavaScript.
- Roadmap: Step-by-step guidance for becoming a developer.

## Features
- Interactive Compiler: Practice code directly in the browser.
- Assignment Quizzes: Test your knowledge after each topic.
- Telugu Documentation: Explanations in the native language.
- User Dashboard: Track your learning progress and streaks.

## Links
- Homepage: https://codenative.co.in/
- Roadmap: https://codenative.co.in/roadmap.html
- Sign In: https://codenative.co.in/signin.html
